reviews.review_description: It’s been shut down for almost half a year now and I am honestly happy people are not yelling over some stupid creatures, great quality though, hope the developers make a game that won’t make someone scream there hearts out.
I Remember The Old Days❤️🥲

Look the reason its been shutdown because it looked in my opinion a bit too similar to the official steal a brainrot or just call it copyright so to the overly affectionate babies dont even bother asking for it back cuz it most likely wont at all so go on with life an read some books instead of telling people to kill themselves over some genuinely stupid creatures that wont help you get a job or an actual life but i was a player of this game so i too feel bad but not sobbing to the point where it feels like someone losing your girl and this is the same with steal a sigmon
So mabye play the Steal A Brainrot VR World or play the actual Steal A Brainrot on Roblox but that does mean you will have to deal with WAY more overly dramatic brain-DEAD toddlers 
So either do that or READ A BOOK

reviews.review_title: NOTE: THIS GAME HAS BEEN SHUTDOWN
reviews.review_description: As you can see, this game has been shutdown. Most likely because it looked similar to SAB or Gorilla Tag. You will not be able to join a public server anymore or even play this game at all. For alternatives, I recommend “Steal A Brainrot Vr World” or the original Steal a Brainrot on Roblox.

reviews.review_title: Definitely needs an AI voice moderator
reviews.review_description: I play call of duty warzone and that game is 17+ but chat bans people for saying almost nothing sometimes, this game is aimed at children and has no protection at all, I heard my daughter say some things we don’t let her say on steal a monkey and he’d to tell her she would be off if she kept it up then I cast it to my phone to see what the other children were screaming and it’s literally children screaming the F word all the way through repeating the hard R word constantly with mindless abandon because they are too young to even comprehend what they’re saying

Honestly, even though it’s a copy of a Roblox game, the immersion into vr is pretty awesome. Most people rate the game poorly because they get upset that someone stole from them. (which is literally the point of the game) The reason I cannot rate this game highly, is because of the extreme toxicity and how there is no way to deal with it. Either add some sort of voice monitoring, report system or moderators because an extremely toxic game like this is not safe for younger users.

This game is great even though it is a copy from the one on roblox i dont think its for kids that are 11 and under because you will hear the N word alot and younger kids swear  for when I play i do recommend private servers if you would like a more relaxing time but out of all of it, its a great game

reviews.review_title: Best 1:1 Replica of The Real Game
reviews.review_description: I’ve tried to play steal a brainrot in VR and tried a lot of games but this one stands out, it’s like I’m playing Roblox but with gorilla tag movement. it got all the same characters in steal a brainrot.

reviews.review_title: The Worst community in the Metaverse
reviews.review_description:
NEW NOTICE 8/29/2025:
Installed this game again because I was very bored. I was better this time, but I joined a server that had an abusive admin. He spawned brainrot Gods but then took everyone's brainrots like it's nothing! I'm truly never playing this game again

The first time I played, someone gave me a free brainrot as a gift, but 1 day later, I kept seeing spoiled kids calling me the N Word and a b*tch. I was grinding great but they just ruined it by stealing my brainrot god and mythic. (70% of my stuff) Uninstalled this crap in 2 days to save me from crashing out.

When I play the game I'll look for a target to steal from, Once the gate opens i'll rush and steal their best or any brainrot Once they notice me i'll start breaking ankles. I Juked a kid so hard he got so mad that he started cussing at me When i stole his brainrot🤣🤣 5 stars Really deserved😊😊.

I had the honor of alpha testing it and boy was it fu. TO do with freinds. I got on with friends and it's a game with actual content. Even though for now nothing changes the fact of interaction with the game and each other is awesome. Can't wait for weekly updates. 10/10 do recommend

reviews.review_title: Community sucks and the new update ruins
reviews.review_description: First of all, the community has been racist and homophobic since the start, and from what I see, it will only get worse. Second of all, the game now has no punishment system, where you used to be able to trap people in your base if they were stealing something, but now that their is a respawn button, that feature is gone, which makes it so much less fun. Also, there is a modder at least half of the time, and deletes everything from everyone’s base. The way to fix the respawn button would be for.it to be named different, and teleport you in the air a bit it get you unstuck. Last thing is that also people can’t base camp anymore, which makes it so that once again, you can’t punish people for trying to get into your base early. Fix this game, or its popularity is gone, and no one will play the game. Another thing is that you can barely steal anything now as you are super slowed when trying to steal.
